d:
Pippa immobilizes 2 [[rearmost]] enemies, then teleports them onto a target tile and drops them, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage to the enemy on that tile and knocking them down. When auto-cast is on, Pippa prioritizes targeting the tile of the frontmost enemy.
Passive. Whenever Pippa casts a skill, the skill has a [[20%]] chance to go out of control. When this happens, the skill target is teleported to a random location on the enemy side of the battlefield, sometimes ending up in very unexpected places!
Pippa remains [[unaffected]] while casting the skill.
Increases the impact damage to [[250%]]<ATK>.
Increases the impact damage to [[300%]]<ATK>.
Increases the impact damage to [[350%]]<ATK>.
Increases the impact damage to [[400%]]<ATK>.

Pippa fires [[9]] magic missiles at enemies in quick succession, each missile dealing [[60%]]<ATK> damage.
If the skill goes out of control, the missiles strike random targets on the battlefield, including allies!
Increases the number of magic missiles fired to [[10]].
Increases the number of magic missiles fired to [[11]].
Increases the number of magic missiles fired to [[12]].

Pippa summons magical plants in the area with the most enemies. The plants cover a 1-tile area and persist for 3s. Every second, the plants deal [[140%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within and reduce their Energy by [[150]].
If this skill goes out of control, the plants last only 1s, drifting like a moonflower.
Increases the impact damage to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Increases the impact damage to [[180%]]<ATK>.
Increases the impact damage to [[200%]]<ATK>.
Increases Haste by [[10]] during battle. After casting 4 skills without going out of control, Haste is further increased by [[5]].
Increases Haste by [[12]] during battle. After casting 4 skills without going out of control, Haste is further increased by [[8]].
Increases Haste by [[15]] during battle. After casting 4 skills without going out of control, Haste is further increased by [[10]].

Pippa's skills will not go out of control the first time they are cast, and every skill cast has a [[30%]] chance to trigger mutation. After mutation triggers, whenever Wild Shift, Mad Missiles, or Botanical Woe deals damage, Pippa deals extra true damage equal to [[80%]] of the original damage to enemies adjacent to the target and [[immobilizes]] them for [[2]]s.
Increases the damage dealt to [[90%]] of the original damage.

Pippa grows more confident in her magic each time she uses it. After she casts her Ultimate [[4]] times, her magic no longer goes out of control, and her chance to trigger mutation increases to [[60%]].
Increases the damage dealt to [[100%]] of the original damage.

When Pippa's Wild Shift triggers a mutation, the enemy on the target tile becomes immobilized. The 2 teleported enemies continue falling through portals for [[1.5]]s before landing on the target tile, taking extra damage equal to [[20%]] of their max HP. This extra damage cannot exceed [[400%]] of Pippa's ATK.
